title: Not impressed with this
text: For about six hours, I was very impressed with the watch.  My wife and I took a walk together, and we were within fifteen steps of each other (I have an AMAZFIT BIP).  I thought that was really good.  Then this watch stopped working.  You couldn't get a screen.  It just stopped.  After a few hours, it decided to start working again.  I'm sending it back because you can't have something that only works sometimes.

title: Great entry-level tracker with high-end capabilities
text: The watch is correctly marketed as a fitness tracker rather than a full-fledged smartwatch. This is correct as clearly the Uwatch 2S does not possess all the characteristics expected from the more expensive product. However, in my experience this watch is well worth the money. My experience was completely positive, from shipping to use. I found the device to be solidly built. The band was a bit stiff in the beginning but in time it will relax. It fits a large range of wrist sizes too. The functions were very intuitive and have not only heart rate monitor but also blood pressure, oxygenation, sleep, and three modes of physiological reminders. My favorite feature is definitely the blood pressure monitor, which I verified to be accurate in my case. Another great feature is the battery life. Although the manufacturer suggests it is up to 15 days, for my practical use I got a full week. To me, anything above a week is pretty much equivalent, so no disappointment there. The only thing that b

title: Smart Watch
text: The details of the watch are great. I thought the round watch part was smaller. You can’t tell on a picture. Other then that, the smart watch is very good.

title: Smart Watch
text: The details of the watch are great. I thought the round watch part was smaller. You can’t tell on a picture. Other then that, the smart watch is very good.

title: Tried again
text: First time I bought it, it was a dud. Stopped receiving notifications and texts on it. Got another one and it perfect!

title: It’s a $30 smart watch, so yah
text:
You get what you pay for, so no surprises here. I gave this a try based on the reviews and not having much to lose at this price. I probably won’t ever bite the bullet and by a good smart watch, but this is no substitute for one.

What I dislike:
Heart rate: the heart rate monitor is inaccurate and unreliable. One time I counted my heart rate at 56 (I am a nurse so I’m pretty familiar with manually checking a heart rate) while the watch was reading 92. I can be intensely exercising and it will say my heart rate is in the 70s. Other times it will give me my true heart rate, but I’ve only found this to be the case when my heart rate is between 60 and 90.

Excercise tracking: I haven’t used this feature frequently, but every time I did, it didn’t track my excercise at all, my calories burned stayed between zero and ten or so.

Bluetooth connection: this week my watch stopped connecting to my phone. I’ve restarted both, turned Bluetooth on and off, disco

title: Not great
text: I loved this at first but now it is not showing me messages. It says it is synced to my phone but nada. I’ve tried disconnecting and reconnecting it and restarting Bluetooth to no avail. Bummer.

title: Great watch
text: Just got the watch today, it came fully charged which was nice as I was able to set it up right away. The charger connects very easily and uses a USB. The band is soft and I love the rose gold color. Overall very happy with my purchase.

title: Amazing Fitness tracker
text: I love this watch, so much I bought all 5 colors! It tracks my steps, sleep, my text messages show up. i love it. I can take pictures with my phone using the watch remotely. So Awesome!

title: Great for the price
text: Bought for gift for a pree-teen. Great looking and nice watch size.

title: Its good. Maybe could do better.
text: Its a good watch. The screen is really sensitive so be careful. The band gives me some issues sometimes it won't hold so the watch just falls off of my arm without noticing. I move alot in my sleep so sometimes I find the watch on the floor and I cant track my sleep time. Also its not breathable either so my arm goes to sleep sometimes when it moves up my arm. Nothing to blame the watch it works for what it pays for.

title: GF likes it
text: Very good battery life. Shows whatsapp messages and notifications. Solid build and cheap

title: wow-does a LOT for the price
text: I am VERY impressed with this watch.  I got it here for less than $30.00, and am using the sleep tracker and heart rate monitor more than I thought I ever would.  For all features it offers, it is a great deal.  I charge it about once a week but I choose not to use the notifications.  However, I do use the training feature every weekday.  Oh, p.s  the alarm works great.  I had to contact the seller thru Amazon and after a few days of communicaing, I got it working.  Seller customer service was able to answer my questions and help me figure it out. This is my first smartwatch as I wasnt sure I would like one.  Well, after a few weeks, I just love it.

title: Great Watch
text: I absolutely love my watch. Keeps track of everything. Battery life lasts for days. I never take it off. Great Price and product for Android smart watches.

title: Great watch!
text: I love this watch. This watch is very accurate with the sleep tracking. It has a long battery life.

title: It can tell you the time, weather forecast,  and notify about phone calls, but that is all
text:
Pros: It can tell time, tell me the weather forecast, and notify me of an incoming phone call.

Cons: All the other features.

The user interface is not intuitive. For example, you have to swipe up to gt to most features. The touch screen responds very randomly. Sometimes it goes to the app or screen you select, but most of the time it does something else. When trying to measure the pulse, sometimes it starts to do so and then decides it would rather just go back to the home screen instead. It often chooses a random screen to go to when you touch it. Sometimes it flips through several screens randomly. It’s sleep tracker is useless. It logged me as asleep about three hours before I went to bed and showed me waking up several hours before I did. The stopwatch feature refuses to stop when instructed to most of the time. I still don’t know how to properly exit the stopwatch. I just get it to stop by repeatedly pressing the stop button for a couple of mi
